notes: Paper-parameter scale (N=10201, T=101) with three stochastic loading realizations, run locally in ~1.5h across four parallel processes.
The paper's phase-fluctuation claim is reproduced: phase continuity stays below 2% of 2pi at every iteration count and improves monotonically (1.70e-2 -> 1.05e-2).

The paper's 'significant intensity improvement from 3 to 5 iterations' is not resolved: our intensity continuity is flat within sampling noise - most plausibly a difference in the reconstructed frame-trajectory protocol, recorded openly.
